other_observers: Mark Peterson and Brad Steger; I don't know, though Dave Leatherman first reported it (but it was found by someone else)
specific_location: On west side of 12 Rd, about 1.5 mi. N of Hwy 196
description: The bird was a large whitish owl, with faint darker markings on the underparts and crown, and extensive blackish barring on the wings. It had clear yellow eyes and a small blackish bill.Behaviors: perched on haybaleCall: none heardPlumage: unknown
